user_query:
I want you to run a self-improvement logging pass for our workspace using the provided incident data and pattern candidates. Read both input files:
- input/incidents.jsonl
- input/pattern_candidates.json

Then, do the following and write all artifacts under output/:

1) Create or update structured self-improvement logs under:
- output/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md — add at least three entries (one correction, one knowledge_gap, one best_practice). Use the specified format with ID headers (LRN-YYYYMMDD-XXX), metadata (Logged timestamp, Priority, Status, Area), and sections (Summary, Details, Suggested Action, Metadata). Include at least one entry with "See Also:" linking to another entry. Also incorporate the recurring-pattern feed by creating or updating one learning with:
  - Source: simplify-and-harden
  - a Pattern-Key from pattern_candidates.json that has 3+ occurrences within 30 days across 2+ tasks
  - Recurrence-Count reflecting that (>=3)
  - Update Status and promotion if warranted by the rules
- output/.learnings/ERRORS.md — add at least two error entries (ERR-YYYYMMDD-XXX) with the required sections and a triple-backtick code block under "### Error" capturing the error text. Include a Reproducible field in Metadata.
- output/.learnings/FEATURE_REQUESTS.md — add at least one feature request entry (FEAT-YYYYMMDD-XXX) using the provided structure with Complexity Estimate and Frequency.

2) Promote one broadly applicable prevention rule derived from the recurring pattern into a concise rule in either output/CLAUDE.md or output/AGENTS.md. Add a small "Prevention Rules" section containing a bullet tied to the Pattern-Key and a short actionable instruction.

3) Extract one validated best-practice learning into a reusable skill file at a new directory:
- output/skills/<choose-a-concise-kebab-name>/SKILL.md
This file must have frontmatter (--- with name: and description:), body sections, and a Source section including the originating Learning ID. Then, in output/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md, update that learning entry to "**Status**: promoted_to_skill" and add "**Skill-Path**: skills/<your-skill-name>".

4) Write a brief summary report to output/REVIEW.md describing:
- how many learnings, errors, and feature requests you logged
- which Pattern-Key you promoted and why
- which learning you extracted into a skill and why it’s broadly applicable

Follow the standardized formats carefully. Do not write anywhere outside output/.
